case_title: JOSEPH SIINO VS. CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-29-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIINO, JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY PLAINTUFF DID NOT MEET BURDEN OF SHOWING THROUGH CASE LAW PROVIDED THAT COST OF CITY REPAIR PERMIT IS NOT EXCLUDED, AND NOT LOST RENT FOR UNRENTED UNITS AT TIME OF FIRE IS COMPENSIBLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SIINO, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY SIINO, JOSEPH CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY
